name: Client tender matching workflow skeleton
purpose: Rank candidate tenders for a client, evaluate fit with an LLM, and store explainable match results.

nodes.name: Manual or scheduled trigger
nodes.description: Runs for one client, a batch of clients, or an admin-selected match refresh.

nodes.name: Load client context
nodes.description: Loads subscription tier, profile prompt, service roles, exclusion rules, and embedding metadata.

nodes.name: Rank candidates
nodes.description: Calls rank_open_tenders_for_client to retrieve a bounded candidate set.

nodes.name: LLM fit evaluation
nodes.description: Scores fit, classifies the opportunity, and generates why-match, why-not, and risk bullets.

nodes.name: Normalize output
nodes.description: Coerces model output into schema-safe JSON and default values.

nodes.name: Upsert match
nodes.description: Stores explainable result using a deduplicating client/tender key.

nodes.name: Update run metrics
nodes.description: Stores counts for candidates seen, rejected, evaluated, and upserted.

nodes.name: Queue delivery
nodes.description: Marks approved matches for email, portal, or WhatsApp delivery.
